linGAM
  • Changelog

Changelog

Version 0.2.0

Released 2026-05-01

New features

  • Shape constraints for s() terms and LinGAM: mono_inc, mono_dec, convex, concave, periodic.

  • Fast path is now the only path — removed fast parameter from gridsearch(). All grid searches use QR+Cholesky by default.

  • Robust grid search uses dedicated IRLS path with threaded evaluation.

  • Statistics methods added to both GAMCore and LinGAM: loglikelihood(), aic(), bic(), deviance_explained().

  • Selective grid search via search_terms parameter: restrict tuning to specific term indices or types.

Improvements

  • Modular src/lingam/ package layout with __slots__ for memory efficiency.

  • PEP8 naming: b_spline_basis, solve_pirls, irls_solve, etc.

  • b_spline_basis supports periodic wrapping.

  • Penalty builders split into dedicated module with new first_diff_penalty and circular_second_diff_penalty.

Version 0.1.0

Released earlier

  • Initial release with LinGAM (single-term) and GAMCore (multi-term formula interface).

  • B-spline basis via vectorised De Boor recursion.

  • SVD data-augmentation solver (PIRLS).

  • Huber IRLS robust fitting.

  • GCV grid search with QR+Cholesky fast path and SVD basic path.

  • Partial dependence, confidence/prediction intervals, and decomposition plotting.

Previous
